title: X is rolling out automatic translation and photo editing powered by Grok
summary: X is introducing automatic translation and photo editing features powered by its Grok AI model, enhancing the platform's capabilities for global users and content creators.
content: New automatic translations and photo editing on X are powered by the company's flagship AI model.

zh.title: X推出由Grok驱动的自动翻译和照片编辑功能
zh.summary: X正在推出由其Grok AI模型驱动的自动翻译和照片编辑功能，增强了平台对全球用户和内容创作者的功能。

title: Insta360’s Snap is a tiny magnetic phone screen for taking rear-camera selfies
summary: Insta360 unveiled the Snap, a magnetic accessory that attaches to smartphone backs to enable rear-camera selfies with real-time preview. The device works with both iOS and Android, offering improved selfie quality though with some usability trade-offs.
content:
The Snap lets you frame selfies using your phone’s best cameras.	

Insta360 just announced the Snap, a new smartphone accessory designed to improve the quality of your selfies. It works like a digital mirror magnetically attached to the back of your Android or iOS smartphone so you can preview and properly frame shots using its more capable rear cameras, while touchscreen functionality lets you control camera apps without having to constantly flip your phone around. After testing the Snap with my iPhone 16 Pro for a week I found it to be an effective way to use my phone's multiple rear cameras for selfies, but the accessory is not without some frustrating quirks.
The Insta360 Snap Selfie Screen is availabl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Insta360的Snap是一个用于后置摄像头自拍的小型磁性手机屏幕
zh.summary: Insta360推出了Snap，这是一个磁性配件，可以附加到智能手机背面，实现具有实时预览的后置摄像头自拍。该设备与iOS和Android兼容，提供改进的自拍质量，但存在一些可用性权衡。

title: Unionized ProPublica staff are on strike over AI, layoffs, and wages
summary: ProPublica Guild members representing roughly 150 employees are striking for 24 hours over stalled labor negotiations centered on AI protections, job security, and compensation. The union has been negotiating since 2023 with key issues including layoff protections still unresolved.
content:
Unionized staff at ProPublica, one of the country's leading nonprofit newsrooms, are walking off the job for 24 hours beginning Wednesday and asking the public to honor a digital picket line.
The roughly 150 members of the ProPublica Guild are in the midst of negotiating a collective bargaining agreement after unionizing in 2023. The union says key issues are still in contention, including protections around the use of AI, "just cause" provisions around disciplining or firing an employee, layoff protections, and wages.
"We've been working to resolve this quietly for over two years," says Katie Campbell, a ProPublica Guild member. "This is  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ProPublica工会工作人员因AI、裁员和工资问题罢工
zh.summary: 代表约150名员工的ProPublica工会成员因停滞的劳动谈判罢工24小时，重点是AI保护、工作保障和薪酬。工会自2023年以来一直在谈判，关键问题包括裁员保护仍未解决。

title: How nuclear batteries could speed the race to fusion power
summary: Avalanche Energy is developing a novel class of materials through a DARPA project that converts radiation into electricity, potentially accelerating fusion power research. Nuclear batteries could provide crucial power generation capabilities for advanced fusion experiments.
content: Avalanche Energy is working on an DARPA project to build a new class of materials capable of turning damaging radiation into electricity.

zh.title: 核电池如何加速核融合竞速
zh.summary: Avalanche Energy 正在通过DARPA项目开发一类新型材料，可将辐射转换为电力，可能加速核融合电力研究。核电池可为先进核融合实验提供关键的电力生成能力。

title: GoPro is cutting 23 percent of its workforce
summary: GoPro announced plans to cut 145 employees—23 percent of its 631-person workforce—as the action camera company struggles with competition and declining revenue. The layoffs will occur during Q2 2026 and could cost the company up to $15 million in severance and benefits.
content:
The GoPro Max2 is the company’s most recent action camera, launched in September 2025. | Image: GoPro	

GoPro has announced plans to cut nearly a quarter of its workforce in an effort to return to profitability, after struggling with increased competition and declining revenue.
The cuts, announced in a Form 8-K filing, are expected to amount to 145 jobs, roughly 23 percent of GoPro's 631 employees, and could cost GoPro as much as $15 million in severance payments and healthcare benefits. The company says the cuts will be implemented during the second quarter of 2026, and most of the layoffs will be completed by the end of the year. The company previously laid off workers in two separate rounds in 2024.
GoPro had expected to return to profita …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: GoPro裁员23%
zh.summary: GoPro宣布计划裁员145人——占其631人员工队伍的23%——由于这家运动摄像机公司面临竞争和收入下滑。裁员将在2026年第二季度进行，可能给公司造成高达1500万美元的遣散费和福利成本。

title: Thousands of consumer routers hacked by Russia's military
summary: Russian military-linked actors have compromised consumer routers in over 120 countries, primarily targeting end-of-life devices in homes and small offices. The widespread attack underscores critical vulnerabilities in aging networking hardware worldwide.
content: End-of-life routers in homes and small offices hacked in 120 countries.

zh.title: 数千台消费级路由器被俄罗斯军方黑客攻击
zh.summary: 与俄罗斯军方关联的行为体已在120多个国家破坏了消费级路由器，主要针对家庭和小型办公室中的报废设备。这次广泛的攻击强调了全球老化网络硬件中的关键漏洞。

title: Continuous glucose monitoring made me continuously crazy
summary: The author examines the experience of using over-the-counter continuous glucose monitors like Dexcom Stelo and Abbott Lingo for non-medical biohacking purposes, exploring how constant glucose tracking affects daily decisions and mental health. The piece questions whether CGM adoption by non-diabetics provides genuine benefit.
content:
Continuous glucose monitors — also referred to as glucose biosensors — aren’t just for diabetics anymore.	

Daily life is different when you're tracking glucose. A little over a year ago, I was on my way to a conference. My bags were packed, the Uber was on its way, but there was one last thing to do before I could head to the airport. Tearing open a small isopropyl alcohol wipe, I cleaned the skin on the back of my arm. After that, I applied a small applicator to the clean skin, doing my best to ignore the visible needle inside. I squeezed my eyes shut and pressed a button. It made a ka-thunk. I repeated the process on the other arm. 
In my right arm, I now had a Dexcom Stelo. In the left, an Abbott Lingo. Both were over-the-counter continuous g …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 连续血糖监测让我持续崩溃
zh.summary: 作者探讨了使用Dexcom Stelo和Abbott Lingo等非处方连续血糖监测仪进行非医学生物优化的体验，研究了持续的血糖追踪如何影响日常决定和心理健康。该文质疑非糖尿病患者采用CGM是否能提供真正的益处。

title: Why Microsoft’s war on Windows’ Control Panel is taking so long
summary: Microsoft's decade-long effort to migrate Windows' Control Panel to the modern Settings app remains incomplete due to compatibility concerns with diverse network and printer devices. The company is proceeding cautiously to avoid breaking existing hardware integrations.
content:
The Control Panel still exists in Windows 11. | Screenshot by Tom Warren / The Verge	

Microsoft first started trying to get rid of the Control Panel in 2012, with the launch of Windows 8. More than a decade later, it's still working on migrating all the old Control Panel items into the modern Settings app in Windows 11. While there have been hints that the Control Panel might finally go away, the reality is a lot more complicated for Microsoft.
"We're doing it carefully because there are a lot of different network and printer devices & drivers we need to make sure we don't break in the process," explains March Rogers, partner director of design at Microsoft. I could be wrong, but I think this is the first full explanation we …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 为什么微软对Windows控制面板的战争耗时如此之长
zh.summary: 微软历时十年将Windows控制面板迁移到现代设置应用的努力仍未完成，原因是对各种网络和打印机设备的兼容性考虑。该公司正在谨慎地进行，以避免破坏现有的硬件集成。

title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
summary: Google launched an offline-first dictation app using Gemma AI models to compete with apps like Whisper Flow. The app's offline capability addresses privacy and reliability concerns for voice input.
content: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

zh.title: 谷歌悄悄推出了一款离线工作的AI听写应用
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了一款基于Gemma AI模型的离线优先听写应用，与Whisper Flow等应用竞争。该应用的离线功能解决了语音输入的隐私和可靠性问题。
